title: We Got a Close Look at the Upcoming Factor Gravel Bike and It’s Wild
content:
We got to get a closer look at the unnamed follow-up to the Ostro gravel from Factor at the 2026 Unbound Gravel.

Read the full article at We Got a Close Look at the Upcoming Factor Gravel Bike and It’s Wild on Velo.
author: Logan Jones-Wilkins
